income_statement.note: Investment income $44.7M = interest on ~$1.2B avg cash at ~3.7%. Debt extinguishment gain = redemption 8.25% Notes.

cash_flow.note: CapEx accelerating: Q1 2026 alone = $23.2M. FY2026E CapEx ~$80-120M for Piketon expansion.

balance_sheet.note: Convertible Notes: 0% Senior Notes $~800M (conv price $229.62, matures Aug 2032) + 2.25% Senior Notes $~400M (conv price $97.50, matures Nov 2030). Both raised Aug/Nov 2025.

debt_detail.note: 0% Notes: raised $782.4M net (Aug 2025). 2.25% Notes: raised $388.7M net (Nov 2024). 8.25% Notes ($74.3M) redeemed March 2025.

backlog.note: FY2025 backlog. Q1 2026: total $3.9B (LEU $3.1B incl $2.4B contingent, Tech $0.8B). Contingent LEU depends on Piketon expansion funding.

key_contracts.haleu_operation_contract_option1a: Exercised June 2025. $108.2M funded. Period through June 30, 2026 (Phase 3). Option 1b: $178.7M target, 2 years, not yet exercised.
key_contracts.haleu_production_contract_task_order: Jan 5, 2026: $900M task order + $170M option. Commercial-scale HALEU at Piketon. Under negotiation of definitive agreement.
key_contracts.leu_production_contract: NOT selected for task order in December 2024 round. Eligible for future task orders.
key_contracts.tenex_supply_contract: Through 2028. Russian Decree (Nov 2024, extended Oct 2025) limits exports through Dec 2027. RSA quota needed.

expansion_plans.oak_ridge_tn: Centrifuge manufacturing plant. $560M+ investment over several years. Manufacturing started Dec 2025. Supports thousands of centrifuges.
expansion_plans.piketon_oh: American Centrifuge Plant. Commercial LEU + HALEU production. Fluor (EPC) + Geiger Brothers (construction) contracts signed early 2026. First centrifuges from Ohio 2029.
expansion_plans.oklo_jv: Contemplated JV with Oklo for HALEU deconversion at Piketon, co-located with enrichment.
expansion_plans.sec_48c_credit: $62.4M tax credit allocation granted Jan 10, 2025 for Oak Ridge facility.

market_context.note: Without Russian supply, global market would be undersupplied. Import Ban Act (May 2024) + Russian Decree (Nov 2024-2027) = structural tightening.
